title: Build a Game Settings Panel
description: A game settings panel with four custom-styled checkboxes. The checkboxes use appearance: none to remove native styling, then show a yellow background and a white checkmark via ::after when checked. The checkmark is positioned using display: block, text-align: center, font-weight, color, and line-height.
objectives: Use appearance: none to remove native checkbox styling
Style a checkbox with a custom border, background, and border-radius
Use ::after with content to inject a checkmark character when checked
Control checkmark appearance with font-weight, color, and line-height
Apply transition to smoothly animate the checked state change

files.name: index.html
files.content: Game Settings
